crime.value: Murder at Birlstone Manor - elaborate killing designed to appear as something else, orchestrated by criminal mastermind
crime.quote: This crime is from London, not from America... a great brain and a huge organization have been turned to the extinction

victim.value: Man connected to the Scowrers criminal organization who was targeted for elimination by Moriarty's network
victim.quote: From that moment their man was doomed... turned to the extinction of one man

closed_world.value: Birlstone Manor House and the criminal underworld of Vermissa Valley with its secret lodge network
closed_world.quote: You won't find the order more flourishing anywhere in the States than right here in Vermissa Valley

culprit_and_motive.value: Moriarty orchestrating the elimination of someone who threatened his criminal organization's operations
culprit_and_motive.quote: I can tell a Moriarty when I see one... one whose whole unique position depends upon the fact that all he does must succeed

resolution.value: Holmes deduces the true mastermind behind the crime through analysis of the criminal methodology and warns of future danger
resolution.quote: You heard me warn this man at Birlstone Manor House that the coming danger was greater than the past. Was I right?

investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes as the primary detective, working with Watson and local officials to solve the Birlstone Manor case
investigator.quote: Sherlock Holmes remarked impatiently... He leaned upon his hand, with his untasted breakfast before him

suspect_architecture.value: Two-layer structure: Birlstone locals (including Barker with access and concealment motive) versus the true architects - American Scowrers and Moriarty's organization operating through planted identity
suspect_architecture.quote: This crime is from London, not from America... a great brain and a huge organization have been turned

red_herring.value: The apparent American criminal operation (sawed-off shotguns, Scowrers) designed to mask the sophisticated London mastermind behind the crime
red_herring.quote: No case of sawed-off shot-guns and clumsy six-shooters... This crime is from London, not from America

clue_fairness.value: Holmes's deductive process about Porlock's handwriting and the coded message is demonstrated to Watson (and reader) through observable details
clue_fairness.quote: The Greek e with the peculiar top flourish is distinctive... he took the envelope itself, held it up

social_world.value: Multi-layered criminal hierarchy: Chicago Lodge 29, Vermissa Valley Lodge 341 with Bodymasters, underneath Moriarty's consulting criminal organization
social_world.quote: Brother John McMurdo, Lodge 29, Chicago. Bodymaster J. H. Scott... this great consultant in crime

reveal_mechanic.value: Holmes demonstrates Moriarty's involvement through pattern recognition - the crime's sophistication and systematic organization reveal the master criminal's signature style
reveal_mechanic.quote: You can tell an old master by the sweep of his brush. I can tell a Moriarty when I see one

investigator_wound.value: Holmes's ongoing battle with Moriarty - his recognition that this nemesis can orchestrate crimes from London while remaining untouchable
investigator_wound.quote: his eyes seemed to be looking far into the future... But you must give me time--you must give me time!

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the valley of fear
